info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

get.description: Retrieve a single record by its ID with options to specify field projections and output format.

schema.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id

parameters.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id
parameters.name: projection

schema.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value

parameters.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value
parameters.name: cellFormat

schema.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

parameters.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details
parameters.name: fieldKeyType

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

patch.description: Update a single record by its ID with support for field value typecast and record reordering.

fieldKeyType.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

typecast.description: Automatic data conversion from cellValues if the typecast parameter is passed in. Automatic conversion is disabled by default to ensure data integrity, but it may be helpful for integrating with 3rd party data sources.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

viewId.description: You can only specify order in one view when create record (will create a order index automatically)

anchorId.description: The record id to anchor to

order.description: Where this record to insert to (Optional)

schema.description: Update record by id

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"fieldKeyType":"id","typecast":true,"record":{"fields":{"property1":null,"property2":null}},"order":{"viewId":"string","anchorId":"string","position":"before"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"fieldKeyType\":\"id\",\"typecast\":true,\"record\":{\"fields\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null}},\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"position\":\"before\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record/%7BrecordId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Retrieve a list of records with support for filtering, sorting, grouping, and pagination. The response includes record data and optional group information.

schema.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id

parameters.description: If you want to get only some fields, pass in this parameter, otherwise all visible fields will be obtained, The parameter value depends on the specified fieldKeyType to determine whether it is name or id
parameters.name: projection

schema.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value

parameters.description: Define the return value formate, you can set it to text if you only need simple string value
parameters.name: cellFormat

schema.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

parameters.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details
parameters.name: fieldKeyType

schema.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.

parameters.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.
parameters.name: viewId

schema.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc

parameters.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc
parameters.name: ignoreViewQuery

schema.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

parameters.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.
parameters.name: filter

schema.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value

parameters.description: Search for records that match the specified field and value
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.

parameters.description: Filter out the records that can be selected by a given link cell from the relational table. For example, if the specified field is one to many or one to one relationship, recordId for which the field has already been selected will not appear.
parameters.name: filterLinkCellCandidate

schema.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field

parameters.description: Filter out selected records based on this link cell from the relational table. Note that viewId, filter, and orderBy will not take effect in this case because selected records has it own order. Ignoring recordId gets all the selected records for the field
parameters.name: filterLinkCellSelected

schema.description: Filter selected records by record ids

parameters.description: Filter selected records by record ids
parameters.name: selectedRecordIds

schema.description: An array of sort objects that specifies how the records should be ordered.

parameters.description: An array of sort objects that specifies how the records should be ordered.
parameters.name: orderBy

schema.description: An array of group objects that specifies how the records should be grouped.

parameters.description: An array of group objects that specifies how the records should be grouped.
parameters.name: groupBy

schema.description: An array of group ids that specifies which groups are collapsed

parameters.description: An array of group ids that specifies which groups are collapsed
parameters.name: collapsedGroupIds

schema.description: When provided, other query parameters will be merged with the saved ones.

parameters.description: When provided, other query parameters will be merged with the saved ones.
parameters.name: queryId

schema.description: The record count you want to take, maximum is 1000

parameters.description: The record count you want to take, maximum is 1000
parameters.name: take

schema.description: The records count you want to skip

parameters.description: The records count you want to skip
parameters.name: skip

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

allGroupHeaderRefs.description: All group header refs for the view, including collapsed group headers

searchHitIndex.description: The index of the records that match the search, highlight the records

curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/record?projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&cellFormat=SOME_STRING_VALUE&fieldKeyType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&take=100&skip=0", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

date.description: the display formatting of the date. you can use the following presets: M/D/YYYY, D/M/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, MM-DD, YYYY, MM, DD

time.description: the display formatting of the time. you can use the following presets: HH:mm, hh:mm A, None

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: caveat: the formatting is just a formatter, it dose not effect the storing value of the record

defaultValue.description: Whether the new row is automatically filled with the current time, caveat: the defaultValue is just a flag, it dose not effect the storing value of the record

options.description: The configuration options of the field. The structure of the field's options depend on the field's type.

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

relationship.description: describe the relationship from this table to the foreign table

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

post.description: Create a new field in the specified table with the given configuration

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

lookupOptions.description: The lookup options for field, you need to configure it when isLookup attribute is true or field type is rollup.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

options.description: The configuration options of the field. The structure of the field's options depend on the field's type.

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

relationship.description: describe the relationship from this table to the foreign table

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

fkHostTableName.description: the table name for storing keys, in many-to-many relationships, keys are stored in a separate intermediate table; in other relationships, keys are stored on one side as needed

selfKeyName.description: the name of the field that stores the current table primary key

foreignKeyName.description: The name of the field that stores the foreign table primary key

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"type":"singleSelect","name":"string","unique":true,"notNull":true,"dbFieldName":"string","isLookup":true,"isConditionalLookup":true,"description":"this is a summary","lookupOptions":{"foreignTableId":"string","lookupFieldId":"string","linkFieldId":"string","filter":{}},"options":{"expression":"countall({values})","timeZone":"string","formatting":null,"showAs":{"type":"url"}},"aiConfig":{"modelKey":"string","isAutoFill":true,"attachPrompt":"string","type":"extraction","sourceFieldId":"string"},"id":"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx","order":{"viewId":"string","orderIndex":0}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"type\":\"singleSelect\",\"name\":\"string\",\"unique\":true,\"notNull\":true,\"dbFieldName\":\"string\",\"isLookup\":true,\"isConditionalLookup\":true,\"description\":\"this is a summary\",\"lookupOptions\":{\"foreignTableId\":\"string\",\"lookupFieldId\":\"string\",\"linkFieldId\":\"string\",\"filter\":{}},\"options\":{\"expression\":\"countall({values})\",\"timeZone\":\"string\",\"formatting\":null,\"showAs\":{\"type\":\"url\"}},\"aiConfig\":{\"modelKey\":\"string\",\"isAutoFill\":true,\"attachPrompt\":\"string\",\"type\":\"extraction\",\"sourceFieldId\":\"string\"},\"id\":\"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\",\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"orderIndex\":0}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field?viewId=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterHidden=SOME_BOOLEAN_VALUE&projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field?viewId=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterHidden=SOME_BOOLEAN_VALUE&projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"this is a summary","dbFieldName":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"this is a summary\",\"dbFieldName\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

options.description: The configuration options of the field. The structure of the field's options depend on the field's type.

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

relationship.description: describe the relationship from this table to the foreign table

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

fkHostTableName.description: the table name for storing keys, in many-to-many relationships, keys are stored in a separate intermediate table; in other relationships, keys are stored on one side as needed

selfKeyName.description: the name of the field that stores the current table primary key

foreignKeyName.description: The name of the field that stores the foreign table primary key

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/convert \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"type":"singleSelect","name":"string","unique":true,"notNull":true,"dbFieldName":"string","isLookup":true,"isConditionalLookup":true,"description":"this is a summary","lookupOptions":{"foreignTableId":"string","lookupFieldId":"string","linkFieldId":"string","filter":{}},"options":{"expression":"countall({values})","timeZone":"string","formatting":null,"showAs":{"type":"url"}},"aiConfig":{"modelKey":"string","isAutoFill":true,"attachPrompt":"string","type":"extraction","sourceFieldId":"string"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"type\":\"singleSelect\",\"name\":\"string\",\"unique\":true,\"notNull\":true,\"dbFieldName\":\"string\",\"isLookup\":true,\"isConditionalLookup\":true,\"description\":\"this is a summary\",\"lookupOptions\":{\"foreignTableId\":\"string\",\"lookupFieldId\":\"string\",\"linkFieldId\":\"string\",\"filter\":{}},\"options\":{\"expression\":\"countall({values})\",\"timeZone\":\"string\",\"formatting\":null,\"showAs\":{\"type\":\"url\"}},\"aiConfig\":{\"modelKey\":\"string\",\"isAutoFill\":true,\"attachPrompt\":\"string\",\"type\":\"extraction\",\"sourceFieldId\":\"string\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/convert", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Getting associated records for a view filter configuration.

200.description: Returns the view to filter the configured records.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/filter-link-records \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/filter-link-records", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Automatically generate suggestions for filling a specific field

viewId.description: Set the view you want to fetch, default is first view. result will filter and sort by view options.

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

orderBy.description: An array of sort objects that specifies how the records should be ordered.

groupBy.description: An array of group objects that specifies how the records should be grouped.

ignoreViewQuery.description: When a viewId is specified, configure this to true will ignore the view's filter, sort, etc

200.description: Returns the task ID for the auto-fill process

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/auto-fill \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"viewId":"viwXXXXXXX","filter":"string","orderBy":"string","groupBy":"string","ignoreViewQuery":"string","mode":"all"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"viewId\":\"viwXXXXXXX\",\"filter\":\"string\",\"orderBy\":\"string\",\"groupBy\":\"string\",\"ignoreViewQuery\":\"string\",\"mode\":\"all\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/auto-fill", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.summary: Stop auto-fill a field by AI

200.description: Stop auto-fill a field by AI successfully

curl --request POST \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/stop-fill \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/%7BfieldId%7D/stop-fill", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

  --url 'https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation/record-index?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&recordId=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/aggregation/record-index?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&recordId=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Create a new table in the specified base with customizable fields, views, and initial records. Default configurations will be applied if not specified.

dbTableName.description: Table name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, start with letter, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case insensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db table name in the base.

icon.description: The emoji icon string of the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

lookupOptions.description: The lookup options for field, you need to configure it when isLookup attribute is true or field type is rollup.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab

showValue.description: whether to displays the specific value on the graph

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/selection/copy?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&ranges=%5B%5B0%2C+0%5D%2C+%5B1%2C+1%5D%5D&type=columns' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/selection/copy?viewId=viwXXXXXXX&ignoreViewQuery=SOME_STRING_VALUE&filterByTql=%7Bfield%7D+%3D+%27Completed%27+AND+%7Bfield%7D+%3E+5&filter=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&filterLinkCellCandidate=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellCandidate=recXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=fldXXXXXXX&filterLinkCellSelected=recXXXXXXX&selectedRecordIds=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&orderBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&groupBy=SOME_STRING_VALUE&collapsedGroupIds=SOME_STRING_VALUE&queryId=qry_xxxxxxxx&projection=SOME_ARRAY_VALUE&ranges=%5B%5B0%2C+0%5D%2C+%5B1%2C+1%5D%5D&type=columns", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/selection/paste \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

lookupOptions.description: The lookup options for field, you need to configure it when isLookup attribute is true or field type is rollup.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://app.teable.ai/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/plan \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"type":"singleSelect","name":"string","unique":true,"notNull":true,"dbFieldName":"string","isLookup":true,"isConditionalLookup":true,"description":"this is a summary","lookupOptions":{"foreignTableId":"string","lookupFieldId":"string","linkFieldId":"string","filter":{}},"options":{"expression":"countall({values})","timeZone":"string","formatting":null,"showAs":{"type":"url"}},"aiConfig":{"modelKey":"string","isAutoFill":true,"attachPrompt":"string","type":"extraction","sourceFieldId":"string"},"id":"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx","order":{"viewId":"string","orderIndex":0}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("app.teable.ai")

payload = "{\"type\":\"singleSelect\",\"name\":\"string\",\"unique\":true,\"notNull\":true,\"dbFieldName\":\"string\",\"isLookup\":true,\"isConditionalLookup\":true,\"description\":\"this is a summary\",\"lookupOptions\":{\"foreignTableId\":\"string\",\"lookupFieldId\":\"string\",\"linkFieldId\":\"string\",\"filter\":{}},\"options\":{\"expression\":\"countall({values})\",\"timeZone\":\"string\",\"formatting\":null,\"showAs\":{\"type\":\"url\"}},\"aiConfig\":{\"modelKey\":\"string\",\"isAutoFill\":true,\"attachPrompt\":\"string\",\"type\":\"extraction\",\"sourceFieldId\":\"string\"},\"id\":\"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\",\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"orderIndex\":0}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/field/plan", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

options.description: The configuration options of the field. The structure of the field's options depend on the field's type.

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

dbTableName.description: Table name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, start with letter, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case insensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db table name in the base.

icon.description: The emoji icon string of the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

lookupOptions.description: The lookup options for field, you need to configure it when isLookup attribute is true or field type is rollup.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab
can display as bar or ring in number field with single cellValue value

showValue.description: whether to displays the specific value on the graph

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

showAs.description: According to the results of expression parsing to determine different visual effects, where strings, numbers will provide customized "show as"

}

data = res.read()
